name: bandit.empty_camp_retirement_live
description: Fixture-backed empty-camp retirement live sanity proof: the real live-world turn loop retires a fully empty bandit camp while preserving one home-side-populated negative site and one home-empty active-outside negative site in the same run.

steps.label: post_load_empty_retirement_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the empty-camp retirement matrix fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the live turn-loop retirement proof
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later empty-retirement evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_fully_empty_positive_site
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world did not contain the unretired fully empty positive camp with no home-side signals and no active outside pressure
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains one unretired fully empty bandit camp eligible for retirement before the live turn loop runs
steps.failure_rule: If the fully empty positive footing is missing, later retired_empty_site logs cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_home_side_negative_site
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world did not contain the home-side-populated negative site that must not retire
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a negative site with home-side presence and no active outside group
steps.failure_rule: If the home-side negative footing is missing, same-run retirement proof cannot cover one-side-populated behavior.

steps.label: preflight_saved_active_outside_negative_site
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world did not contain the home-empty active-outside negative site that must not retire
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a negative site with no home-side signals but unresolved active outside pressure
steps.failure_rule: If the active-outside negative footing is missing, same-run retirement proof cannot cover outside-pressure preservation.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_empty_retirement_turn_loop
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a real live turn-loop window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines proving the fully empty camp retired
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the retired_empty_site line, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_empty_retirement
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the empty-camp retirement probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_empty_retirement
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the empty-camp retirement probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_fully_empty_site_retired
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist the fully empty site as retired_empty_site after the live turn loop
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, the fully empty camp is persisted as retired_empty_site with no home-side signals and no active outside pressure
steps.failure_rule: If the fully empty site is not retired in saved metadata, the same-run log cannot close retirement proof by itself.

steps.label: audit_saved_home_side_negative_not_retired
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world retired a site that still had home-side presence
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, the home-side negative site remains active and records home_side_present as the retirement blocker
steps.failure_rule: If the home-side negative site retires, the conjunctive empty-camp predicate is wrong.

steps.label: audit_saved_active_outside_negative_not_retired
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world retired a home-empty site that still had unresolved active outside pressure
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, the active-outside negative site remains active and records active_outside_present as the retirement blocker
steps.failure_rule: If the active-outside negative site retires, unresolved outside pressure is being pruned incorrectly.

steps.label: audit_empty_retirement_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show the fully empty site retiring with both home-side and active-outside pressure absent
steps.failure_rule: No empty-camp retirement live sanity credit if the same-run debug artifact lacks the retired_empty_site line for the fully empty camp.

evidence_contract.claim: the live turn loop retires a fully empty bandit camp only when both home-side signals and active outside pressure are absent, while preserving one-side-populated negative sites
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for empty-camp retirement behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, three saved preflight fixture states, real wait/turn-loop action, same-run retired_empty_site artifact, save/writeback, and saved positive/negative postconditions are not all green/matched.
